comments: Approved. The review packet requires confirmation that the reconciliation note explicitly records M3 (A & B) and M4 execution history, clarifies that M3 preceded M4 without any physical bypass of L2/L3 gates, and does not modify implementation files or directories. The note satisfies this: Section 2 marks M3 as completed prior to M4 and names both bounded packages, M3-A and M3-B, with their artifacts; Section 3 marks M4 as completed post-M3 and identifies its artifact; Section 4 explicitly states that M3-A and M3-B were executed, reviewed, and closed before M4 was initiated, and that the apparent deviation was only a reporting artifact rather than a physical bypass of L2/L3 phase gates. workflow/iteration-state.json is consistent with that ordering because its key_artifacts list places the M3-A and M3-B execution/review artifacts before the M4 artifacts and then lists the reconciliation note/review artifacts afterward. Repository inspection found no evidence that this reconciliation work changed implementation code or directories: the relevant artifacts are confined to tasks/*.md and tasks/*.json, git diff for the reconciliation note and review packet returned no additional implementation-path changes, and git status for the reconciliation artifact set showed no tracked source-code modifications.
